chunks.text: University of California at Berkeley Department of Electrical Engineering & Computer Sciences Instructional Support Group /share/b/pub/fann.help Jan 24, 2008 FANN ---- FANN (http://leenissen.dk/fann/

, 2008 FANN ---- FANN (http://leenissen.dk/fann/) is a Neural Net user interface that runs on a server and uses a WEB browser plug-in on the users' computer. It will be available for CS182 (http://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs182) in Spring 20
p://inst.eecs.berkeley.edu/~cs182) in Spring 2008. This page will be updated with instructions when it is ready. Instructional Support Group 378 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda inst@eecs.berkeley.edu
